# chenterry.com — LLM Router

Canonical: https://chenterry.com/llms.txt
Full index: https://chenterry.com/llms-full.txt

Use this file as a concise router. For source material, prefer `llms-full.txt`.

## Start here
- Home: https://chenterry.com/
- Posts index: https://chenterry.com/posts/
- CrowdListen thesis anchor: https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten/

## Focus areas
- Thesis writing on agent-native product development and distribution
- CrowdListen: social signal → product decisions → agent-ready execution
- Foundational essays on AI-native workflows and knowledge interfaces
